title: hep-ph-demo benchmark expectations
description: Universal schema for per-benchmark numeric expectations. Reused by all skills (singlet-doublet, 2hdm-a, dark-su3, future models). Numeric values live here, NOT in SKILL.md narrative.

benchmark_id.description: Unique name for this benchmark within the skill.

model.description: BSM model name (free string; matches model field in summary.json).

parameter_point.description: Parameter values that define this benchmark point. Keys are model-specific.

expectations.description: Expected physics observables at this benchmark point.

central.description: Central expected value of Omega h^2.

band.description: [lo, hi] acceptance band for Omega h^2.

channel_fractions.description: Expected channel fraction ranges. Keys are channel names (free strings).

dominant_channel.description: Name of the expected dominant annihilation channel at this parameter point.

physics_caveat.description: Optional note about parameter-point specificity or known limitations of these expectations.

paper.description: arXiv ID or DOI of the paper supporting these values.

commit.description: Git commit SHA when this fixture was committed.
